site.name: ATELIER NORTH
site.description: A multi-disciplinary design studio focused on the intersection of craft, culture, and context.

hero.title: Sculpting Space
hero.subtitle: & Conscious Living.
hero.description: Atelier North operates at the intersection of architectural rigor and sensory curation. We define environments that honor the landscape and the human experience.

services.title: Architectural Design
services.description: Bespoke structural solutions that harmonize with their immediate context. We create monolithic forms that feel light, prioritizing natural ventilation and poetic geometry.
services.imageAlt: Minimalist concrete architectural structure with dramatic shadows and geometric lines.
services.outcome: Timeless structures that increase in cultural value over generations.

services.title: Interior Curation
services.description: Beyond decoration, we design the tactile interface of life. Selecting rare materials and bespoke furniture to create a narrative of sophisticated silence.
services.imageAlt: Luxury minimalist living room with warm textures and soft morning sunlight.

steps.label: STEP 02
steps.title: Curation
steps.description: Material palette development and artisan sourcing.

steps.label: STEP 03
steps.title: Execution
steps.description: Staged installation and atmospheric lighting calibration.

services.outcome: Environments that foster deep focus and restoration.

services.title: Urban Planning
services.description: Master-planning for communities that value connection and scale. We design the in-between spaces that define the pulse of modern urban life.
services.imageAlt: Aerial view of a planned urban neighborhood with green pedestrian paths.

steps.label: STEP 02
steps.title: Curation
steps.description: Zoning strategy and community ecosystem design.

steps.label: STEP 03
steps.title: Execution
steps.description: Infrastructure phase management and policy alignment.

services.outcome: Sustainable urban hubs that promote social friction and belonging.

services.title: Sustainable Strategy
services.description: Integrating regenerative technology into luxury frameworks. We prove that ethical design and high-end aesthetics are not mutually exclusive.
services.imageAlt: Close-up of sustainable building materials in a premium architecture studio.

steps.label: STEP 01
steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Carbon footprint analysis and resource auditing.

steps.label: STEP 02
steps.title: Curation
steps.description: Renewable energy systems and circular material sourcing.

steps.label: STEP 03
steps.title: Execution
steps.description: LEED certification management and efficiency monitoring.

services.outcome: Zero-impact living without compromising architectural integrity.
